shared_properties: 32x32 brass housing with an amber lens and dark rear fins.
Beam origin remains centered on the front lens axis.
differences: Four frames add carriage sway and lens pulse for rail-driven movement.
Rear bracket extends 6 px with a counterweight to communicate travel direction.
Lens core brightens to #F5EFE0 during the forward sweep frames.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use SpriteSheetBundle for the four-frame housing animation and move the entity along a rail through a SearchlightPatrol component.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load obstacles/obstacle_moving_searchlight_4f_32x32.png through AssetServer before patrol routes are spawned.
runtime_notes: Patrol motion uses gameplay data with a 120 px per second sweep rate.
Frame timing remains independent from patrol interpolation.
Searchlight pivot matches the fixed emitter to simplify beam scripts.

context.usage: Rail-driven moving light hazard used in late floors where the safe path shifts over time.

shape.silhouette: Searchlight housing with a slim rail trolley, counterweight arm, and pulsing front lens.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 128x32 px with four 32x32 frames.
Counterweight and trolley details remain readable at 1x scale.
Lens pulse changes brightness without shifting the beam origin.

reference_images.label: umbra_scale_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Art deco tower skyline, twilight palette, gold trim rhythm, and layered silhouette depth anchor.

reference_images.label: umbra_scale_character
reference_images.purpose: Umbra body proportions, horn silhouette, limb taper, and exposure glow anchor.
